# Aditya Agarwal

> Full-stack software engineer, founder, travel enthusiast, and content creator based in Sydney, Australia. Building AI at Coreflow AI. 250K+ app downloads. 500K+ LinkedIn impressions. 17 trips in one year. Writes about tech, AI, travel, and personal finance. Pianist. BITS Pilani graduate. Travel | Tech | Finance.

## About

Aditya Agarwal (@adioof) is a full-stack software engineer, founder, and creator based in Sydney, Australia. He has built consumer products from zero to scale — including apps with 250K+ organic downloads and platforms serving 20M+ users. Currently a founding engineer at Coreflow AI, one of the fastest growing AI startups. Moved from India to Sydney at 24 with a 5x pay jump. Outside of code, he's an extensive traveler (17 trips in 2025 alone), pianist, street photographer, and writes about AI, tech, and finance with 500K+ impressions on LinkedIn. His mantra: Travel | Tech | Finance.

## Current

- Software Engineer (Founding) at Coreflow AI, Sydney, Australia (Oct 2025 - Present) — 20M+ users, one of the fastest growing AI startups
- Writing on LinkedIn about tech, AI tooling, and finance — 500K+ impressions, 7K+ followers
- Writing on DEV Community about AI tooling, developer workflows, and open source
- Extensive traveler documenting journeys on Instagram (@adioof)

## Experience

- Software Engineer at Wishlink, Gurugram (Mar 2023 - Sep 2025) — Joined at $3M seed, turned down ~66 LPA offer. Built the creator commerce platform end-to-end. Top 1% bracket. Company raised $17.5M Series B after he left
- Associate Software Engineer at DigiCert, Bengaluru (Aug 2022 - Dec 2022) — Cert Central project, Spring Boot / Java, third-party integration security layer for API calls
- CTO at Hcare: Online Homeopathy Consultancy, Bangalore (Apr 2021 - Aug 2022) — Technical and design head at age 20. Built complete Android app with UI/UX, scaled to 20K+ users, developed wallet & referral system with Firebase
- Founder at x3ntech, Mumbai (Apr 2020 - Mar 2022) — Development company with multiple live apps. 250K+ downloads on Google Play Store, 4.6 star average rating

## Notable Products & Projects

- Neo Vault — Privacy-first vault app, scaled 0 to ~250K downloads with primarily organic growth using ASO
- Nox — Smart browser extension for dark/light mode theme control on any website. Published on Chrome Web Store, Firefox Add-ons, Mac App Store (Safari), and Edge Add-ons
- Tripsy — Instagram Reel travel place extraction app. Paste a travel reel, get every location mentioned using AI
- Xnote — Secure locked notes with in-app Google Drive backup, OCR image-to-text, speech-to-text AI
- React Masonry Library — Handles 10K items at 60fps (open source)

## Education

- BITS Pilani — B.E. Electrical & Electronics (2019-2023)
  - Minor in Finance
  - BITSAT score: 320
  - 5 internships during college
  - Associate at Center for Entrepreneurial Leadership
  - Lights & sound head for fashion club
  - Core member, Department of Backstage & Infrastructure Management
  - Volleyball club
- Bal Bharati Public School — 95.6% in CBSE Class XII (School topper), CGPA 10.0 in Class X

## Skills

TypeScript, React, React Native, Python, Java, Kotlin, Django, Firebase, Android Development, C++, Node.js, Spring Boot, Selenium, Adobe Illustrator, UI/UX Design

## Travel

Extensive traveler — 17 trips in 2025. Countries visited include India, Australia, Vietnam, Georgia, Bhutan, UAE, Sri Lanka. Documents travel on Instagram @adioof. Built Tripsy, an AI-powered travel app that extracts places from Instagram Reels. Moved from Mumbai to Sydney at age 24.

- Writes about AI tooling, developer workflows, personal finance, and tech industry trends

- "I Woke Up to 14 PRs I Didn't Write"

- "I Built a React Masonry Library That Handles 10K Items at 60fps"
